$comment: Checkpoint registry per ADR-0003. Each entry: name, dest (dir under models/checkpoints/), license, licenseStatus (verified|disputed), files[] (path, url, sha256). Disputed entries require `download.py <name> --accept-terms <name>`. Verified licenses permit commercial use and redistribution (Apache-2.0, MIT, BSD, CC BY). No weights ship in this repository. NOTE: the exact set of human_model_files LHM++ touches at runtime is not fully verified — if the renderer requests FLAME/MANO/SMPL files not listed here, fetch the full 3DAIGC/LHMPP-Prior bundle with LHM++'s own scripts/download_pretrained_models.py --prior.

checkpoints.name: lhmpp-700m-smplx-free
checkpoints.description: LHM++ SMPLX-FREE checkpoint (~5.2 GB), canonical T-pose 3DGS PLY export. Only published on ModelScope; the HuggingFace repos 3DAIGC/LHMPP-700M-SMPLX-FREE and 3DAIGC/LHMPP-700M-PixelShuffle do not exist (verified 2026-07-20).
checkpoints.dispute: The ModelScope model card declares Apache License 2.0, but the LHM family carries an unresolved Apache-2.0 (HF tag) vs CC BY-NC (repo model card) conflict — https://github.com/aigc3d/LHM/issues/175. LHM++ weights inherit this dispute until upstream resolves it. By accepting you confirm your use complies with whichever license applies.

checkpoints.name: birefnet-general
checkpoints.description: BiRefNet general matting weights used by LHM++ preprocessing (engine/BiRefNet).
checkpoints.note: Weights by ZhengPeng7/BiRefNet (MIT, HF license tag); byte-identical mirror in 3DAIGC/LHMPP-Prior. SHA-256 from the HuggingFace API.

checkpoints.name: lhmpp-prior-voxel-grid
checkpoints.description: Diffused-voxel skinning grids required by the LHM++ renderer (smplx_diffused_voxel).
checkpoints.dispute: 3DAIGC/LHMPP-Prior declares no license. These voxel grids are precomputed from the SMPL-X body model, which is under the MPI non-commercial research license. By accepting you confirm your use is permitted.

checkpoints.name: lhmpp-prior-dense-sample-points
checkpoints.description: Dense body-surface sample points (160k) for LHM++ query points.
checkpoints.dispute: 3DAIGC/LHMPP-Prior declares no license. These points are sampled from the SMPL-X body surface (MPI non-commercial research license). By accepting you confirm your use is permitted.

checkpoints.name: smplx-human-model-files
checkpoints.description: SMPL-X template files instantiated by the LHM++ renderer even for the SMPLX-FREE checkpoint (core/models/rendering/skinnings/base_skinning.py calls smplx.create for neutral/male/female).
checkpoints.dispute: SMPL-X weights are licensed by MPI/Meshcapade for non-commercial research only. LHM++ loads them at inference time even with the SMPLX-FREE checkpoint ('SMPLX-FREE' drops the pose estimator, not the SMPL-X template — verified in base_skinning.py). By accepting you confirm your use of SMPL-X is permitted (e.g. research use, or you hold a commercial license).

checkpoints.name: insightface-buffalo-l
checkpoints.description: InsightFace buffalo_l pack (ArcFace + RetinaFace detector) for the identity score. Extracts to insightface/models/buffalo_l/.
checkpoints.note: sha256 is null: buffalo_l is a GitHub release asset, not on HuggingFace, and InsightFace publishes no signed hash — no hash could be verified programmatically. License confirmed MIT (github.com/deepinsight/insightface).
